---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new tool or an improvement to an existing one
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like to see?**
A clear description of the feature or new generator tool.

**Why is this useful?**
What problem does it solve, or what use case does it enable?

**Additional context**
Mockups, references to similar tools, or other context.
